subject: U03
question: Should the formal model be TLA+/Alloy or an FSM transition table?
why_material: Determines maintenance cost and whether the model is executable here.

options.name: FSM transition table
options.what_it_is: A markdown transition table + a runtime checker script.
options.evidence_for: runs on a clean machine; no toolchain

options.name: TLA+/Alloy
options.what_it_is: A full formal model with a model checker.

recommendation: Adopt the FSM table as the model of record; defer TLA+ unless U02 requires it.
